# TEIKOS — Full context for AI assistants

TEIKOS (https://www.teikos.io) is infrastructure-grade scheduling for AI voice agents, AI phone receptionists, and voice AI agencies.

## What TEIKOS is

- A scheduling backend / source of truth for appointment booking
- NOT a voice platform (not Vapi/Retell replacement) — the layer beneath them
- Database-first: PostgreSQL with Row-Level Security, atomic hold→confirm state machine
- Platform-agnostic: Vapi, Retell AI, n8n, Make, Zapier, custom HTTP

## Core booking pipeline

1. business_facts_get — agent loads business context (hours, services, timezone, custom facts)
2. availability_check — real-time slot computation (never cached)
3. appointment_hold — 3-minute atomic lock on a slot
4. appointment_confirm — database transaction re-verifies and commits booking

Additional tools: caller_intake, appointment_cancel, appointment_reschedule, voice_log_create.

## Key differentiators vs Calendly/Cal.com

- Built for concurrent voice agent callers (race conditions)
- Hold-then-confirm prevents double-bookings
- Deterministic JSON responses (not LLM-generated availability)
- Idempotent writes safe to retry

## Pricing tiers (approximate)

- Free (User): Business scheduling, no self-service integrations
- Pro (~$40/mo): Own integrations, up to 3 active, Agent Lab
- Agency (~$199/mo): Manage client accounts, unlimited integrations on agency workspace, 5 client seats included

## Partner platforms

- Vapi: https://vapi.ai
- Retell AI: https://retellai.com
- n8n: https://n8n.io
